parameters.query:
WITH txs AS (
  SELECT t.*,
    COALESCE(t.item_codigo,
      (SELECT tar.item_codigo FROM opex_tarifario tar
       WHERE tar.contratista_id = t.contratista_id
         AND tar.activa = true
         AND LOWER(tar.actividad) ILIKE '%' || LOWER(SPLIT_PART(t.tipo_servicio,' ',1)) || '%'
       LIMIT 1)
    ) AS item_resuelto
  FROM opex_transactions t
  WHERE t.procesado = false
    AND t.fecha_tx >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '7 days'
  LIMIT 500
),
con_tarifa AS (
  SELECT t.*,
    get_tarifa_vigente(
      t.contratista_id,
      t.item_resuelto,
      COALESCE(NULLIF(t.or_nombre,''), 'OTROS_OR'),
      t.fecha_tx::DATE,
      'diurna'
    ) AS tarifa_vigente
  FROM txs t
)
SELECT
  ct.id           AS tx_id,
  ct.tx_id_fuente,
  ct.contratista_id,
  ct.contratista_nombre,
  ct.tipo_servicio,
  ct.zona,
  ct.or_nombre,
  ct.costo_unitario,
  ct.costo_total,
  ct.fecha_tx,
  ct.tiene_acta_cierre,
  ct.ot_id,
  ct.tarifa_vigente,
  NULL::NUMERIC AS tolerancia_pct,
  NULL::TEXT    AS tarifa_version,
  CASE WHEN ct.tarifa_vigente IS NOT NULL AND ct.tarifa_vigente > 0
    THEN ROUND(((ct.costo_unitario - ct.tarifa_vigente) / ct.tarifa_vigente) * 100, 2)
  END AS delta_vs_tarifa_pct,
  NULL::NUMERIC AS zscore,
  (SELECT SUM(t2.costo_total) FROM opex_transactions t2
   WHERE t2.contratista_id = ct.contratista_id
     AND t2.fecha_tx >= DATE_TRUNC('month', ct.fecha_tx)
     AND t2.fecha_tx < DATE_TRUNC('month', ct.fecha_tx) + INTERVAL '1 month'
  ) AS ejecutado_mtd,
  (SELECT b.monto_budget FROM opex_budget b
   WHERE b.contratista_id = ct.contratista_id
     AND b.anio = EXTRACT(YEAR FROM ct.fecha_tx)::INT
     AND b.mes  = EXTRACT(MONTH FROM ct.fecha_tx)::INT
   ORDER BY b.effective_from DESC LIMIT 1
  ) AS budget_mes
FROM con_tarifa ct;

UPDATE opex_transactions SET procesado = true WHERE id IN (SELECT DISTINCT tx_id FROM opex_alerts WHERE generada_en > NOW() - INTERVAL '10 minutes') OR (procesado = false AND fecha_tx < CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '7 days');

meta.notes: Cada 2h: 1) Fetch Metabase 66793 → 1 solo INSERT batch (no 867 queries). 2) Query enriquecido corre UNA vez. 3) Reglas A1-A9. 4) Slack alertas altas. CONFIGURAR: reemplazar METABASE_API_KEY_AQUI.
